title: 🏡 VBS — Villa Blue Skies Too: Full Project Setup
description:
## What
VBS (Villa Blue Skies Too / Dolce Blanco) is a 3BR pool villa in Canggu, Bali co-owned by Joe & Ben. The project has been created and needs full operational setup.

## Context
- **Listing name:** Dolce Blanco - 3BR Pool Villa in Canggu
- **Booking.com Hotel ID:** 8440577
- **Property Manager:** Sri (srikaka1@gmail.com)
- **Held under:** PT. Heliconia Cantik Ventures
- **Financial Model:** https://drive.google.com/open?id=1VlHm9lthV14tBEFV3WJbAHU-qFGCH0iO1t99jusxKoM
- **MC Page:** /app/investments/vbs

## Tasks

### Immediate
- [ ] Get Airbnb listing URL from Ronnie and add to CONTEXT.md + MC page
- [ ] Get Booking.com direct listing URL from Ronnie and add to MC page
- [ ] Confirm Dropbox path under `/Heliconia Cantik Ventures New/Heliconia Properties/` — create folder if not existing
- [ ] Open financial model and review current P&L

### Data Gathering
- [ ] Pull last 12 months of revenue from financial model
- [ ] Get current occupancy rates from Booking.com / Hostex
- [ ] Review petty cash sheet (Sri) — flag any anomalies
- [ ] Review Sri's timesheet — confirm hours/pay are current

### Platform Checks
- [ ] Log into Booking.com partner portal — verify listing is live, pricing correct
- [ ] Log into Airbnb host dashboard — verify calendar sync with Hostex
- [ ] Check Pricelabs settings — confirm dynamic pricing is active
- [ ] Verify Hostex is syncing both channels

### Optimisation
- [ ] Add financial summary stats to MC page once revenue data is pulled
- [ ] Consider automating monthly P&L summary → WhatsApp Joe
- [ ] Review guest review scores on both platforms

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] CONTEXT.md has Airbnb + Booking.com listing URLs
- [ ] MC page /app/investments/vbs loads and all links work
- [ ] Financial model reviewed and revenue data noted
- [ ] All platform credentials confirmed working
